# Cobus van Vuuren

> Business Automation Audits for South African professional services firms — accountants,
> attorneys, and financial advisors. Structured 90-minute diagnostic, five-day turnaround,
> costed implementation plan. R50,000 minimum savings guaranteed or full refund.

## What Cobus does

Runs structured Business Automation Audits for SA professional services firms.
Diagnostic-led, not tool-first. Finds where time is leaking, ranks opportunities by
impact-to-effort ratio, delivers a costed day-by-day implementation plan as a PDF.

## Services

- Business Automation Audit: R9,500 (early adopter, first 10) / R15,000 standard
- Strategy Call: R2,500 (credited against audit if booked)
- Implementation: R20,000–R80,000 (separate engagement, post-audit)

## Proof

- RhinoBerry (Cobus's agency): client went from R3,000/month for 6 leads to 79 leads in month 1
- 7 years operating RhinoBerry digital marketing agency (South Africa)
- Guarantee: if audit doesn't find R50,000 in annual savings, full refund — no conditions

## ICP

Owner-operators of SA professional services firms: accountants (CA/SAICA), attorneys,
financial advisors (CFP/FAIS). 3–20 staff. R2m–R15m annual revenue. Bill by the hour —
admin is direct revenue loss.

## What CVV is NOT

- Not an AI training course or workshop
- Not a technology vendor (no tools sold or resold)
- Not an open-ended retainer
- Not for marketing automation (that is RhinoBerry's lane)

## Background

Cobus van Vuuren founded RhinoBerry, a South African digital marketing agency, in 2019.
After automating RhinoBerry's own operations over three years, he launched CVV to offer
structured Business Automation Audits to other professional services firms. The methodology
is the same diagnostic used on his own business first.
